title: prunus × lannesiana f. villosa
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. villosa, also known as the Korean cherry tree or wild cherry, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus × lannesiana f. villosa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Prunus × lannesiana f. villosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs, to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
